Name: Argog
Description: Argog was an Asgardian warrior who used a variety of weapons. He fought against Daken during Siege. After the two had exchanged a few blows, Daken relented and instead offered to switch sides and help Argog and the Asgardians kill Norman Osborn. Argog was abruptly killed by Osborn who decapitated him with a repulsor blast from his Iron Patriot armor. With his "accomplice" down, Daken grabbed Argog's head from the ground and hurled it as a projectile at another attacking God.
